title: Calibration Zero
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A black-market neural calibrator who syncs illegal wetware for the Tokyo underworld discovers her own memory partitions were written by a corporation that died thirty years ago, which means she was never born.
long_description: A black-market neural calibrator who syncs illegal wetware for the Tokyo underworld discovers her own memory partitions were written by a corporation that died thirty years ago, which means she was never born.
